faqs.question: How do I make a payment?
faqs.answer: Payments are processed securely at the time of booking. Payment methods typically include major credit/debit cards and digital wallets.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: Credit and debit cards as well as some digital wallets are accepted.

faqs.question: When is payment due?
faqs.answer: A deposit is usually due at the time of booking, with the balance due before arrival.

faqs.question: Is my payment secure?
faqs.answer: Yes, all payments are handled through secure systems.

faqs.question: What are the check-in and check-out times?
faqs.answer: Standard check-in is from 3–4 PM, and check-out is by 10–11 AM.

faqs.question: Can I request an early check-in or late check-out?
faqs.answer: Yes, early check-in and late check-out may be available depending on availability and may require an additional fee.

faqs.question: How do I get the keys or access code?
faqs.answer: Access details are shared before arrival, usually via email or a secure portal. Many properties use code-operated locks.

faqs.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: Cancellation policies vary and will be provided at the time of booking.

faqs.question: Is smoking allowed?
faqs.answer: Smoking is not permitted inside any property. Some buildings may have designated outdoor smoking areas.

faqs.question: What is your pet policy?
faqs.answer: Pets are allowed in select properties with prior approval and may require a fee.

faqs.question: What is the minimum age requirement to rent?
faqs.answer: Guests must meet the minimum age requirement to book, usually between 21 and 25 years old.

faqs.question: What is your policy on noise or quiet hours?
faqs.answer: Quiet hours are generally observed from 10 PM to 8 AM.

faqs.question: Can I host an event or party?
faqs.answer: Events and parties are not permitted without prior approval.

faqs.question: Are there additional cleaning fees?
faqs.answer: Yes, a cleaning fee applies to each booking. The amount varies by property.

faqs.question: Are there any additional fees I should be aware of?
faqs.answer: Additional fees such as pet fees or mid-stay cleaning may apply.

faqs.question: Do you offer discounts for extended stays?
faqs.answer: Discounts may be available for stays of 7 nights or more.

faqs.question: How do I protect my vacation?
faqs.answer: Optional travel insurance is available and recommended.

faqs.question: Do you provide Wi-Fi?
faqs.answer: Yes, Wi-Fi is available at all properties. Details are shared before arrival.

faqs.question: What amenities are included?
faqs.answer: Typical amenities include a kitchen, linens, towels, and toiletries. A full list is provided for each property.

faqs.question: Do you provide toiletries?
faqs.answer: Yes, basic toiletries such as soap and shampoo are provided.

faqs.question: Do you provide extra bedding or cribs?
faqs.answer: Yes, available upon request. Additional fees may apply.

faqs.question: Do you provide baby equipment such as high chairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, baby equipment can often be provided upon request.

faqs.question: Are there laundry facilities?
faqs.answer: Most properties have in-unit or shared laundry facilities.

faqs.question: What is the maximum occupancy of the property?
faqs.answer: The maximum occupancy is specified for each property.

faqs.question: Is the property wheelchair accessible?
faqs.answer: Some properties are wheelchair accessible. Please confirm before booking.

faqs.question: What type of coffeemaker is provided?
faqs.answer: Coffee makers are typically included. Details are provided before arrival.

faqs.question: Is parking available?
faqs.answer: Yes, parking is available at most properties. Some have limits on the number of vehicles.

faqs.question: How far is the nearest beach?
faqs.answer: Distances vary, but many properties are within a short drive.

faqs.question: Are there restaurants within walking distance?
faqs.answer: Many properties are close to local dining options.

faqs.question: Are there nearby grocery stores?
faqs.answer: Yes, grocery stores are usually within a short drive.

faqs.question: Are there local attractions nearby?
faqs.answer: Yes, such as parks, shops, restaurants, and cultural sites.

faqs.question: Do you have recommendations for restaurants and activities?
faqs.answer: Yes, local recommendations are provided in an area guide.

faqs.question: What should I do if I encounter an issue during my stay?
faqs.answer: Contact the support team immediately for assistance.

faqs.question: Do you offer mid-stay housekeeping?
faqs.answer: Yes, available for an additional fee.

faqs.question: Do you offer airport pick-up or shuttle services?
faqs.answer: Airport transfers are not provided directly, but local services can be recommended.

faqs.question: What do we need to do before departure?
faqs.answer: Guests are typically asked to tidy up, remove trash, and follow basic checkout instructions.

faqs.question: What happens if there’s a hurricane or natural disaster?
faqs.answer: In the event of a mandatory evacuation, unused nights are refunded. Travel insurance is recommended.

faqs.question: What are the emergency contact numbers?
faqs.answer: Emergency contacts are provided before arrival in your booking details or guest guide.

faqs.question: What services do you provide to property owners?
faqs.answer: We offer full vacation rental management, including marketing, guest communication, housekeeping, maintenance, and payments.

faqs.question: How do you market my property?
faqs.answer: Properties are listed on major booking channels as well as our direct booking website, supported by email and social media marketing.

faqs.question: How do you handle guest communication?
faqs.answer: Our team manages all guest inquiries, bookings, and support before, during, and after each stay.

faqs.question: How much can I expect to earn?
faqs.answer: Earnings depend on location, season, and property type. A rental income projection can be provided.

faqs.question: What fees do you charge?
faqs.answer: We typically charge a management commission on rental revenue, plus optional fees for add-on services.

faqs.question: How and when do I get paid?
faqs.answer: Owner payouts are usually made monthly with a full statement of bookings and expenses.

faqs.question: Who handles cleaning and maintenance?
faqs.answer: Professional cleaners and trusted local service providers are scheduled and coordinated for each property.

faqs.question: What if there’s an emergency at my property?
faqs.answer: We provide 24/7 guest support and coordinate with emergency services when needed.

faqs.question: Do I have to provide linens or supplies?
faqs.answer: We can supply and manage linens and essentials, or use owner-provided items.

faqs.question: How do I block off dates for personal use?
faqs.answer: Owners can block off dates for personal stays through an online portal or by contacting the management team.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a contract?
faqs.answer: Yes, a management agreement outlines responsibilities, fees, and terms.

faqs.question: Can I cancel the management contract?
faqs.answer: Yes, with proper notice as defined in the agreement.

faqs.question: Do I get to approve guests?
faqs.answer: Guests are screened and vetted, but additional approval preferences can be discussed.

faqs.question: Do you handle taxes and permits?
faqs.answer: We assist with collecting and remitting lodging taxes and can guide owners through permit requirements.

faqs.question: Do you provide insurance?
faqs.answer: Owners are encouraged to carry homeowner and liability insurance. Guest damage is covered through deposits or damage waivers.
